videos.title: People ordering food in subway
videos.ground_truth: There appears a car stopping at a drive thru where two people start ordering some food. There comes voice from the mic asking about their order and then the woman orders the same thing the other did but just changing one item with a thigh. Then there appears sandwich with lots of different vegetables and meat and coldrinks on the side. Its a commercial from SUBWAY which says eat fresh.

videos.title: Restaurant interior

There is a yello lighting all over the dining area and music band with music equipments. There is a music playing in a background and then the name of the restaurant appears as VERSE - LOS ANGELES.

videos.title: People cooking in a restaurent kitchen
videos.ground_truth: There are lots of people in a kitchen restaurant prepping food. One person entering with a box of green peppers. People are cooking with different ingrediets like onions, green peppers, cheese, avocade and chicken. They are cutting, chopping, prepping vegetables and mixing with meat and souces. They are preparing a bowl of salad. In last frame, the name of the restaurant appear which Chipotle - the mexican grill.

videos.title: A girl is roaming in streets
videos.ground_truth: A girl is roaming around in streets. She is enjoying and meets another girl. The streets are wet, which means it recently rained in that area. The background music is also there and the vocals of singer singing in english.

videos.title: Dancing girls
videos.ground_truth: One girls starts the video. She then joins the group of girls dancing on a song. There are total 6 girls dancing with a tree in their background in nighttime. There is background song playing.

videos.title: Song playing in a static frame
videos.ground_truth: There is girl standing with a umbrella in front of river. There are many buildings on the other side of the river. This is just a image, with a background song playing. The lyrics of the song appear in the video in the sync of the song played in background.

videos.title: People with a dog in outdoor
videos.ground_truth: There is a women standing on a rock with a young girl. There is also a dog with them who is wiggling his tail. They are in a natural place with some trees and mountains in the background.

videos.title: Pedestrians walking

videos.title: Urban city life with a voiceover
videos.ground_truth: The video starts with lots of car on the bridge and lots of highrise buidings in a daytime. There are lots of people walking on sideways. One bald person in a formal suit notices a bag with many items including money, passports and wires. Then there comes a server with a coffee and see's a screen which says FIGHT FOR US and WANT TO BE A HERO? The girl is walking with her dog and notices a trash in which there is can of hydrogen peroxide. There's always a constant background voiceover explaining all these and then there comes a screen with a text which says IF IT DOESNT ADD UP, SPEAK UP and mentions a call number for national security.

videos.title: Portugal video
videos.ground_truth: There are lots of beautiful multi-colored buildings on a seashore on a bright day. There is a portugal's flag waving in the wind. There is a tram and cars on the street. There is many historical buildings and food and wine on the table. There are some people on the streets and there is a big statue facing the seashore. There are many historical buildings and statues appear and also people playing and doing outdoor activities like skateboarding. Then it transitions to nighttime.

videos.title: Girl giving a elevator pitch
videos.ground_truth: The girl is recording a video for a pitch. She greets and introduces herself as Andrea. She mentions that she is studying marketing from university of dallas in texas.She mentions her business skills and personal skills and mentions that she is dedicated. She is hoping to work in corporate environment.

videos.title: Science argument
videos.ground_truth: There are two people arguing over a topic of science. The person with glasses argues that he and roger bennister are scientist but not the guy in blue shirt. The argument goes on and the guy with glasses is agrressive towards the guy in blue-red shirt and curses him that he is no good and not a scientist at all. Then he tells him to get out of the room.
